channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: U.S. blacklists these Chinese tech firms in latest update to export control list
item.description: China protested Wednesday after the U.S. added dozens of companies to its export control list, including more than 50 based in China that it says sought advanced knowhow in supercomputing, artificial intelligence and quantum technology for military purposes.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Cyprus to fund desalination plants at hotels to reduce impact of water shortages on tourism
item.description: Cyprus says it will make money available to subsidize construction of private desalination plants at hotels on the tourism-reliant island nation as dwindling fresh water reserves in 108 dams are reaching alarmingly low levels.
item.dc:creator: Menelaos Hadjicostis, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: TikTok is facing a rare meme drought. Inside the Great Meme Depression of 2025
item.description: People with a healthy limit on their screen time probably haven’t noticed—but there’s been a meme shortage this March. On TikTok, some have declared a full-blown “Meme Drought,” dubbing it the “Great Meme Depression of 2025.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Samsung Galaxy S25 Edge colors seemingly revealed in new video, and there’s another sign of an imminent launch
item.description: The Samsung Galaxy S25 Edge has been shown off in black and white shades, and it has passed through the FCC.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: YouTube's New Premium Feature: A Game-Changer or Unnecessary Filler?
item.description: YouTube tests a new Premium feature that shows recommended videos in your playback queue, making it easier to add videos without leaving the page.
item.dc:creator: rowan.davies@futurenet.com (Rowan Davies), TechRadar

item.title: The secret to using generative AI effectively
item.description: Do you think generative AI (genAI) sucks? I did. The hype around everything genAI has been over the top and ridiculous for a while now. Especially at the start, most of the tools were flashy, but quickly fell apart if you tried to use them for any serious work purposes.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Waymo plans to bring its driverless taxis to Washington in 2026
item.description: Waymo on Tuesday added Washington to its pioneering robotaxi service's steadily expanding list of U.S. markets, although passengers will have to wait until next year until they can take a driverless ride around the nation's capital city.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: 20 advanced Android 15 tips
item.description: Like many recent Android versions, Android 15 may seem subtle on the surface. And, to be fair, it certainly isn’t the sort of dramatic interface reinvention we’ve seen from Google in the past. But that doesn’t mean it’s short on efficiency-enhancing treats just waiting to be found.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: In 2025, you can’t have an effective democracy without data literacy
item.description: Data literacy should be a part of the 21st-century civics curriculum. The post In 2025, you can’t have an effective democracy without data literacy first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: A European startup scrubs its attempt to launch an orbital rocket on its first test flight
item.description: OSLO, Norway (AP) — A private European aerospace company scrubbed its attempt on Monday to launch the first test flight of its orbital launch vehicle from Norway.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Kotlin 2.1.20 Released: Enhancements for K2 Compiler, Kotlin/Wasm Debugging and More
item.description: Kotlin 2.1.20 has been released with improvements in plugin support for the K2 compiler and Kotlin/Wasm debugging.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Attackers probing backdoor flaw in popular Cisco Smart Licensing Utility, warns SANS
item.description: Organizations running Cisco’s Smart Licensing Utility (CSLU) should update their software as soon as possible to fix two serious vulnerabilities, the SANS Technology Institute has urged.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Air Force CIO to retire after 31 years of federal service
item.description: Venice Goodwine, the Department of the Air Force’s CIO, plans to leave in mid-May and take some time off. The post Air Force CIO to retire after 31 years of federal service first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Meta Unveils Aria Gen 2 Augmented Reality Glasses
item.description: Get ready for some amazing tech that's about to change the way we see the world, literally. Meta has just unveiled its latest creation, the Aria Gen 2 augmented reality (AR) glasses.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
